description_long: This cabin features a compact, rectangular structure with a barrel-vaulted roof, clad in dark, weathered wooden planks. The exterior is framed with a golden-brown trim that accentuates the edges and corners, giving it a sturdy, rustic appearance. The front facade includes a central door with a visible lock plate, suggesting secure entry, while the sides and rear are solid wood with no visible openings. The roof is continuous and curved, constructed from the same dark wood as the walls, and lacks any overhangs or dormers. There are no visible windows or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian, minimalist design. The overall look is reminiscent of a small, traditional log or timber cabin, suitable for use as a shed or outbuilding in an urban or park setting.
description: A small, barrel-roofed wooden cabin with golden-brown trim and a central front door, featuring a rustic, minimalist design with no windows.
description_view_0: The end view shows the arched roof and solid wood paneling, with no visible openings or features except the trim.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance with a central door and lock plate, framed by golden-brown trim.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the first, showing the arched roof and solid wood paneling without any openings.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a plain, uninterrupted wooden wall with no doors or windows, bordered by the same trim.
attribute_roof_type: barrel-vaulted roof constructed from continuous wooden planks with no overhangs or dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side; the cabin features solid wood paneling throughout
attribute_door_placement: A single exterior door is centered on the front facade, featuring a lock plate
